chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Bail Application No.S-392 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026 Applicants are present (on bail). Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G a/w I/O. = The learned A.P.G. submits report/order dated 13.02.2025 passed by the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Digri at Mirpurkhas, whereby the learned Magistrate has taken cognizance of the offence on a C-Class report submitted by the I.O. The applicants/accused have filed the present bail application and have not engaged any counsel, whereas the complainant is also called absent. Since the matter has been sent up for trial and the order of this Court has already maintained the attendance of the applicants/accused for the purpose of trial, and there is no likelihood of any misuse of the concession of bail. They would otherwise suffer by appearing before two different Courts. Moreover, they are no more required for further investigation and are directed to appear before the trial Court to prove their innocence. Even otherwise, the sections applied in the FIR do not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Therefore, the interim bail granted to the applicants/accused vide order dated 10.12.2025 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The instant bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE *Adnan Ashraf Nizamani*
